quality.rationale: 多步相空间积分与链式求导推导+真实致密天体物态方程场景

origin.question: Problem 5.24. What is the speed of sound in an ideal Fermi gas at zero temperature?
origin.solution: Solution 5.24. At zero temperature all energy states in the Fermi gas are filled up to the Fermi level $\mathbf {E} = \mathbf {E}_{\mathbf {F}}$ . Since there are two spin states for fermions the density of fermions in phase space is $2 / h^3$ so that$$\mathrm {d} n / \mathrm {V} = ( 2 / \mathrm {h}^{3} ) \mathrm {d}^{3} \mathrm {p}$$$$\rho = \int_{0}^{\mathrm {P}_{\mathrm {F}}} \left( \mathrm {p}^{2} + \mathrm {m}^{2}\right)^{\frac {1} {2}} \left( 2 / \mathrm {h}^{3}\right) 4 \pi \mathrm {p}^{2} \mathrm {d p}$$$$P = \int_{0}^{P_{F}} \frac {1} {3} p^{2} \left( p^{2} + m^{2}\right)^{- \frac {1} {2}} ( 2 / h^{3} ) 4 \pi p^{2} d p$$where $\mathbf {P}_{\mathbf {F}}$ is the momentum corresponding to the Fermi energy. In Problem 5.22 we found $\mathbf {v}_{\mathbf {s}}^{2} = \mathrm {d}\mathbf {P} / \mathrm {d}\rho$ so$$\mathrm {v_{s}^{2}} = \frac {\mathrm {d P}} {\mathrm {d}\rho} = \frac {\mathrm {d P / d P_{F}}} {\mathrm {d} \rho / \mathrm {d P_{F}}} = \frac {1} {3} \left( \frac {\mathrm {P_{F}}} {\mathrm {E_{F}}}\right)^{2} = \frac {1} {3} \left( 1 - \frac {\mathrm {m}^{2}} {\mathrm {E_{F}}^{2}}\right) .$$Note that for a highly relativistic Fermi gas $\mathbf {v}_{\mathrm {s}} \rightarrow 3^{-\frac { 1 } { 2 }}$ .
